hero.title: About Gal Impex
hero.subtitle: Mongolia's Pioneer in Fire Safety Since 1971
hero.description: Fire Impex is a Mongolian company established in 1971, with a long-standing presence in the fire safety industry. Backed by decades of experience and a skilled professional team, we reliably deliver comprehensive fire safety services—including the supply of fire safety equipment, system solutions, installation, maintenance, and fire extinguisher refilling—for high-demand facilities such as mining, energy, data centers, industrial plants, warehouses, offices, shopping centers, hospitals, and schools.

overview.title: Company Overview
overview.description: Since 1971, Gal Impex has been at the forefront of fire safety solutions in Mongolia. The company provides comprehensive services ranging from fire equipment supply to system installation, maintenance and professional consulting. With decades of experience and certified engineers, Gal Impex supports industrial, commercial and public facilities across the country.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide state-of-the-art fire safety solutions that protect lives and property while ensuring compliance with the highest standards of quality and safety.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.y1971: Established as Mongolia's first fire safety company
timeline.y1991: Reorganized as "Gal" JSC following market reforms
timeline.y2002: Established as Gal Impex LLC with expanded services
timeline.y2012: FM-200 fire suppression system introduced in Mongolia
timeline.y2013: Official Mircom distributor and new headquarters

partners.title: Our Distributor Partners

hero.title: Service Packages
hero.description: Predictable fire safety service for offices, buildings, and industrial facilities. Stay inspection-ready with scheduled maintenance, documentation, refill support, and compliance follow-up.

basic.target: For small offices and low-risk spaces

standard.target: For commercial buildings and growing operations

premium.target: For industrial, mining, and complex facilities

whoFor.title: Who Is This For?
whoFor.standardTarget: Commercial buildings, offices, shopping and entertainment centers

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade your package at any time. Our team will adjust your service schedule and pricing accordingly.
faq.a2: Extinguisher refill is included in Professional and Premium packages, and available as an add-on for Standard.
faq.a3: Yes, we support organizations with multiple locations. Contact us for a customized multi-site package.
faq.q4: Do you issue service records for audit?
faq.a4: Yes, all packages include service records. Professional and Premium packages include full compliance-ready documentation.
faq.a5: Yes, all packages can be tailored to your facility's specific requirements. Contact our engineers for a custom quote.

cta.title: Not sure which package fits your facility?
cta.description: Our engineer can recommend the right plan based on your building type and compliance needs.
